summary: Completed iteration 2 testing of UMKM directory website. Backend APIs functional (93.3% success rate) with persistent security issue. Frontend authentication works but critical dashboard data loading failures remain unresolved despite claimed fixes.

critical_bugs.issue: Stats endpoint not properly protected - returns 200 instead of 401 when no auth token provided
critical_bugs.impact: Security vulnerability - unauthorized access to admin statistics

ui_bugs.issue: All 4 stats cards show '0' instead of actual data (should show total: 13, kuliner: 4, fashion: 2, handmade: 3)
Shows 'Belum ada data UMKM' (no data) despite backend having 13 entries

integration_issues.issue: API calls failing with 401 errors on /api/auth/me and 422 errors on /api/umkm?limit=100

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero, categories, featured UMKM cards
Daftar UMKM page displays 13 UMKM cards correctly
Real-time search functionality on Daftar UMKM
Category and badge filtering on Daftar UMKM
Auth token stored in localStorage properly
Add UMKM dialog opens and form submission works
Logout functionality works - redirects to homepage
All backend API endpoints work individually
UMKM CRUD operations via direct API calls
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Dashboard data loading completely broken - API calls failing with 401/422 errors despite successful login. Auth token integration not working properly for dashboard API calls. Stats cards and UMKM table remain empty. Also fix /api/stats endpoint security vulnerability.
